'''shozajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quad|quad]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quad|quad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shozajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozajithi|shozajithi]] || [[word:shozajiji|shozajiji]] || [[word:shozajishi|shozajishi]] || [[word:shozajiki|shozajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozajuthuthu|shozajuthuthu]] || [[word:shozajujuju|shozajujuju]] || [[word:shozajushushu|shozajushushu]] || [[word:shozajukuku|shozajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozajuthu|shozajuthu]] || [[word:shozajuju|shozajuju]] || [[word:shozajushu|shozajushu]] || [[word:shozajuku|shozajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozajufthuf|shozajufthuf]] || [[word:shozajufjuf|shozajufjuf]] || [[word:shozajufshuf|shozajufshuf]] || [[word:shozajufkuf|shozajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozajethe|shozajethe]] || [[word:shozajeje|shozajeje]] || [[word:shozajeshe|shozajeshe]] || [[word:shozajeke|shozajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozajothotho|shozajothotho]] || [[word:shozajojojo|shozajojojo]] || [[word:shozajoshosho|shozajoshosho]] || [[word:shozajokoko|shozajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozajotho|shozajotho]] || [[word:shozajojo|shozajojo]] || [[word:shozajosho|shozajosho]] || [[word:shozajoko|shozajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozajofthof|shozajofthof]] || [[word:shozajofjof|shozajofjof]] || [[word:shozajofshof|shozajofshof]] || [[word:shozajofkof|shozajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfthĂŻf|shozajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfjĂŻf|shozajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfshĂŻf|shozajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfkĂŻf|shozajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shozajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shozajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shozajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shozajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfthĂŻf|shozajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfjĂŻf|shozajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfshĂŻf|shozajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfkĂŻf|shozajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfthĂŻf|shozajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfjĂŻf|shozajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfshĂŻf|shozajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozajĂŻfkĂŻf|shozajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozajĂŠthĂŠ|shozajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shozajĂŠjĂŠ|shozajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shozajĂŠshĂŠ|shozajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shozajĂŠkĂŠ|shozajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozajathatha|shozajathatha]] || [[word:shozajajaja|shozajajaja]] || [[word:shozajashasha|shozajashasha]] || [[word:shozajakaka|shozajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozajatha|shozajatha]] || [[word:shozajaja|shozajaja]] || [[word:shozajasha|shozajasha]] || [[word:shozajaka|shozajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozajafthaf|shozajafthaf]] || [[word:shozajafjaf|shozajafjaf]] || [[word:shozajafshaf|shozajafshaf]] || [[word:shozajafkaf|shozajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shozajasha|shozajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozajshĂ«sha|shozajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozajrosha|shozajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozajmusha|shozajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozajyasha|shozajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozajnkshĂ«sha|goshozajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozajnkrosha|goshozajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozajnkmusha|goshozajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozajnkyasha|goshozajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shozazajasha|shozazajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozazajshĂ«sha|shozazajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozazajrosha|shozazajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozazajmusha|shozazajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozazajyasha|shozazajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozazajnkshĂ«sha|goshozazajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozazajnkrosha|goshozazajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozazajnkmusha|goshozazajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozazajnkyasha|goshozazajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shezĂŠjasha|shezĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shezĂŠjshĂ«sha|shezĂŠjshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shezĂŠjrosha|shezĂŠjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shezĂŠjmusha|shezĂŠjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shezĂŠjyasha|shezĂŠjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshezĂŠjnkshĂ«sha|goshezĂŠjnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshezĂŠjnkrosha|goshezĂŠjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshezĂŠjnkmusha|goshezĂŠjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshezĂŠjnkyasha|goshezĂŠjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shozfajasha|shozfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozfajshĂ«sha|shozfajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozfajrosha|shozfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozfajmusha|shozfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozfajyasha|shozfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozfajnkshĂ«sha|goshozfajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozfajnkrosha|goshozfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozfajnkmusha|goshozfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozfajnkyasha|goshozfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
